name: AI Customer Support Agent
description: Takes a customer question, uses Exa to search for relevant knowledge base content and documentation, Claude AI crafts a helpful and accurate response grounded in the search results, and posts the answer to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: AI voice chatbot with ElevenLabs & OpenAI for customer service and restaurants

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for knowledge search

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting the answer

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post the support response

customerQuestion.description: The customer's question or support request

companyName.description: Company name for context (helps with knowledge search)

supportTone.description: Tone for the support response: friendly, formal, technical, casual

steps.name: Search for relevant knowledge via Exa
Compile search results as knowledge base
Build Claude prompt for customer support
Build Slack Block Kit support response
